payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark brown stained wooden base cabinet door with a recessed rectangular panel, visible wood grain and a slightly worn/matte finish; countertop edge is visible at the top of the crop and the object appears about 0.7 meters from the camera.
